inputIdea: Build an app for study members to record what they learned.

answers.targetUser: Small peer study groups that meet weekly
answers.painPoint: Members forget to record what they learned after each session.
answers.primaryHypothesis: Members will record learning more consistently if the record flow takes under one minute.
answers.successSignal: At least two users can complete a realistic record without explanation and say what they would change.
answers.minimumValidationMethod: Let users try an interactive web prototype with realistic dummy study data.
